title: Benghuai: Xing Qiong Tiedao - San Zhounian Zhutiqu: Tiansheng Guicai

alternative_titles.en: Honkai: Star Rail - 3rd Anniversary Theme Song: Side Quest King
alternative_titles.ja: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》三周年主题曲：「天生鬼才」

synopsis:
"Who do you think you are?!"
"I'm a... side quest king."
"But what I want is a genius! A genius! Do you know what 'genius' even means?!"
"I know, I'm just... a side quest king."
"I... Are you kidding me?!"

(Source: YouTube)
